overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Red Dead Redemption 2 showing a cowboy character walking through the frontier town of Blackwater onto a long wooden pier extending over calm waters. The character proceeds to the pier's end to overlook the ocean, then turns and walks back toward town. The footage features cinematic golden hour lighting with atmospheric haze and detailed Western frontier architecture.

scene_state.functional_zone: dirt street in frontier town approaching waterfront pier

agents.ego_description: walking steadily down the dirt street toward the pier entrance

notable_agents.action: person in light clothing walking opposite direction near horse-drawn carriage
person standing near the pier entrance steps

entered.detail: tall wooden utility pole with crossbars and wires
unpaved brown dirt street with wagon tracks
decorative wooden archway marking the entrance to the pier
ornate black metal lamp post with multiple lanterns
white painted wooden railing along the pier approach

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a dirt street in a Western frontier town, approaching a wooden pier entrance. Telegraph poles line the left side while a wooden fence runs along the right. The scene is bathed in warm golden hour light with slight atmospheric haze.

scene_state.functional_zone: wooden steps and entrance arch of pier

events.description: ascends wooden steps from dirt street onto the pier deck passing under decorative archway

agents.ego_description: climbing the wooden steps up to the pier level and passing under the entrance arch

entered.detail: weathered wooden planks forming the pier surface
ornate wooden arch with decorative trim and spires

segments.scene_description: The character climbs wooden steps onto the pier proper, passing under an ornate wooden archway. The ground transitions from dirt to weathered wooden planks as the ocean becomes visible in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: open wooden pier deck with ocean views on both sides

agents.ego_description: walking along the open pier deck with expansive ocean views visible on both sides

notable_agents.action: man in dark coat and hat walking toward the camera on the left side of the pier

entered.detail: calm water extending to the horizon with warm sun reflection
empty wooden slatted bench facing the water
stacked wooden boxes and barrels near the railing
roofed wooden structure at the far end of the pier

segments.scene_description: Walking along the open pier deck with the ocean visible on both sides. The character passes wooden benches and cargo crates while approaching the covered pavilion at the pier's end. Other pedestrians walk in the opposite direction.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pavilion section of pier with roof overhead

events.description: enters the covered pavilion section of the pier with wooden roof blocking the sky

agents.ego_description: walking through the covered section of the pier toward the open end

entered.detail: dark wooden roof structure with decorative white trim
vertical wooden posts supporting the roof structure
ornate black metal lantern mounted on the support beam

segments.scene_description: The character enters a covered pavilion section of the pier with a wooden roof overhead supported by vertical beams. The lighting becomes diffused and darker as the open sky is obscured, with ornate lanterns hanging from the supports.

scene_state.functional_zone: end of pier extending over open water with panoramic ocean view

events.description: stops at the end of the pier to look out at the water and distant ship
turns around 180 degrees to face back toward town

agents.ego_description: reaches the pier's terminus, pauses to look at a distant ship on the water, then turns to walk back

entered.detail: white wooden railing marking the end of the pier
small vessel visible on the horizon against the sun

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the covered pavilion, the character reaches the end of the pier where the deck opens to panoramic ocean views. The sun creates a bright backlight as the character stops to look at a distant ship, then turns around to begin the return journey.

scene_state.functional_zone: return walk toward town with Blackwater building visible on left

agents.ego_description: walking back along the pier toward town, passing the blue Blackwater building on the left side

entered.detail: blue wooden building with white trim and clock tower visible on the left
large sign reading BLACKWATER over the covered entrance

segments.scene_description: Walking back toward town, the Blackwater building with its distinctive blue facade and clock tower becomes visible on the left. The character approaches the covered entrance with the BLACKWATER sign overhead, completing the journey along the pier.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a dusty frontier town street out onto a long wooden pier and back again, transitioning from enclosed urban architecture to an open oceanic vista. It begins along a dirt road lined with telegraph poles and fences under a warm golden haze, moving forward until the ground shifts from earth to weathered planks as the character passes under an ornate wooden archway. The scene then expands across the open pier deck, passing benches and cargo crates before the light becomes diffused and dim beneath the roof of a covered pavilion adorned with hanging lanterns. As the camera emerges from the pavilion, the view opens into a bright, backlit panoramic of the ocean and a distant ship, before the character turns around to head back toward town. The journey concludes as the camera retreats along the pier, bringing the blue facade and clock tower of the Blackwater building and its overhead sign back into view.
